case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS ALLEN CHAPEL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $450.00 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEN CHAPEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEN CHAPEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEN CHAPEL $450.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $510.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEN CHAPEL
